  children={"Replace datasource file"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/datasources/{id}/replace-file"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replace the file backing a file-type datasource. Accepts multipart/form-data with a "file" field.
